details.request: Implement the approved Validator-A execution wrapper and retry handoff automation design.

spec.objective: Add Validator-A wrapper, retry handoff preparation, schemas, guide documentation, and npm commands for the harness.
success_criteria: Add machine-readable schemas for Validator-A handoff, Validator result, and Generator retry handoff.
Implement scripts/run-validator-a.mjs with dry-run support, Codex CLI command shaping, result artifact capture, schema validation, resource failure handling, and task ledger events.
Implement scripts/prepare-generator-retry.mjs that converts Validator FAIL results into generator-input-retry-N.json and emits Conflict Report after repeated identical failures.
Add an operational guide documenting Validator-A pipeline usage and failure modes.
Register npm scripts and verify syntax, dry-run behavior, retry generation behavior, and harness audit.
Do not run external Validator-A model execution beyond dry-run unless explicitly approved.
